api_payload.title: Kazuar Malware Evolves Into Modular Espionage Ecosystem for Secret Blizzard Operations

detection_pack.sigma:
title: APEX - Kazuar Malware Evolves Into Modular Espionage Ecosystem for  — Generic Cve
id: apex-generic-14862f68
status: experimental
description: |
  Detects exploitation activity for Kazuar Malware Evolv (GENERIC_CVE). Review the specific vulnerability class and affected product to tune this rule for your environment.
  Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v161.0
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/Kazuar Malware Evolv
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/05/25
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
    - attack.t1190
    - attack.t1071
    - attack.t1203
logsource:
  category: network_connection
  product: windows
detection:
  unexpected_outbound:
    Initiated: 'true'
    DestinationPort:
      - 4444
      - 1337
      - 31337
      - 8888
      - 9001
      - 9999
  ioc_network_indicators:
    DestinationHostname|contains:
      - '436cfce71290c2fc2f2c362541db68ced6847c66a73b55487e5e5c73b0636c85'
      - '69908f05b436bd97baae56296bf9b9e734486516f9bb9938c2b8752e152315d4'
      - '6eb31006ca318a21eb619d008226f08e287f753aec9042269203290462eaa00d'
      - 'c1f278f88275e07cc03bd390fe1cbeedd55933110c6fd16de4187f4c4aaf42b9'
  condition: unexpected_outboundor ioc_network_indicators
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate applications using non-standard ports
  - Development and testing environments
level: medium
detection_pack.spl:
| comment "Kazuar Malware Evolves Into Modular Espionage Ecosystem for  | Kazuar Malware Evolv | APEX v161.0"

index=network OR index=proxy earliest=-24h
| eval threat_match = if(match(_raw, "(?i)(436cfce71290c2fc2f2c362541db68ced6847c66a73b55487e5e5c73b0636c85\|69908f05b436bd97baae56296bf9b9e734486516f9bb9938c2b8752e152315d4\|6eb31006ca318a21eb619d008226f08e287f753aec9042269203290462eaa00d\|c1f278f88275e07cc03bd390fe1cbeedd55933110c6fd16de4187f4c4aaf42b9)"), 1, 0)
| where threat_match=1
| eval rule="APEX-Kazuar Malware Evolv", severity="HIGH"
| stats count min(_time) as first_seen max(_time) as last_seen by src_ip, dest_host, rule, severity
| convert timeformat="%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ" ctime(first_seen) ctime(last_seen)
| sort -count
detection_pack.yara:
rule APEX_Kazuar_Malware_Evolv__GENERIC_CVE {
    meta:
        description   = "APEX detection: Kazuar Malware Evolves Into Modular Espionage Ecosystem for Secret Bli"
        cve           = "Kazuar Malware Evolv"
        vuln_class    = "GENERIC_CVE"
        author        = "CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v161.0"
        date          = "2026-05-25"
        reference     = "https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com"
        severity      = "high"
        mitre_attack  = "T1071, T1203"
    strings:
        $ioc_0 = "436cfce71290c2fc2f2c362541db68ced6847c66a73b55487e5e5c73b0636c85" ascii wide nocase  // IOC: 436cfce71290c2fc2f2c362541db68ced6847c66
        $ioc_1 = "69908f05b436bd97baae56296bf9b9e734486516f9bb9938c2b8752e152315d4" ascii wide nocase  // IOC: 69908f05b436bd97baae56296bf9b9e734486516
        $ioc_2 = "6eb31006ca318a21eb619d008226f08e287f753aec9042269203290462eaa00d" ascii wide nocase  // IOC: 6eb31006ca318a21eb619d008226f08e287f753a
        $ioc_3 = "c1f278f88275e07cc03bd390fe1cbeedd55933110c6fd16de4187f4c4aaf42b9" ascii wide nocase  // IOC: c1f278f88275e07cc03bd390fe1cbeedd5593311
    condition:
        any of ($ioc_*)
}
detection_pack.elastic_lucene:
// Elastic Lucene: intel--0480eaa264dc898151449221
("<indicator>") AND @timestamp:[now-30d TO now]
detection_pack.qradar_aql:
/* QRadar AQL: Kazuar Malware Evolves Into Modular Espionage Ecosystem for  | intel--0480eaa264dc898151449221 */
SELECT DATEFORMAT(devicetime,'YYYY-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') AS EventTime,
  sourceip, destinationip, username, LOGSOURCENAME(logsourceid) AS Source,
  QIDNAME(qid) AS EventName, 'intel--0480eaa264dc898151449221' AS AdvisoryID
FROM flows
WHERE (TEXT SEARCH '<indicator>')
AND devicetime > (NOW() - 2592000)
ORDER BY devicetime DESC LIMIT 10000
START '30 days ago' STOP 'now'
detection_pack.chronicle_yaral:
// Chronicle YARA-L: Kazuar Malware Evolves Into Modular Espionage Ecosystem for 
rule apex_intel__0480eaa264dc89815144922 {
  meta:
    description = "Kazuar Malware Evolves Into Modular Espionage Ecosystem for Secret Blizzard Oper"
    author = "CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX"
    severity = "MEDIUM"
    attack_techniques = "TT1190 | TT1071 | TT1203"
  events:
  $e.metadata.event_type = "NETWORK_CONNECTION"
  condition:
    $e
}
detection_pack.crowdstrike:
// CrowdStrike NG-SIEM: Kazuar Malware Evolves Into Modular Espionage Ecosystem for 
#type=ProcessRollup2 | head 10000
| search (CommandHistory contains "<indicator>")
| eval hunt_id="intel--0480eaa264dc898151449221"
| stats count by HostName, FileName, CommandLine
detection_pack.sentinelone:
// SentinelOne Power Query: Kazuar Malware Evolves Into Modular Espionage Ecosystem for 
EventType = 'Process Creation' AND
(ProcessCmd Contains "<indicator>")
| columns SrcProcName, SrcProcCmdLine, AgentComputerName, SrcProcUser
detection_pack.falco:
- rule: APEX - Kazuar Malware Evolves Into Modular Espionage Ecosystem for 
  desc: intel--0480eaa264dc898151449221 - TT1190 | TT1071 | TT1203
  condition: spawned_process and (proc.cmdline contains "<indicator>")
  output: "APEX Alert: %proc.name %proc.cmdline"
  priority: MEDIUM
  tags: [apex, TT1190, TT1071, TT1203]
detection_pack.osquery:
-- OSQuery: Kazuar Malware Evolves Into Modular Espionage Ecosystem for  | intel--0480eaa264dc898151449221
SELECT pid, name, cmdline, path, parent, uid
FROM processes
WHERE (cmdline LIKE '%indicator%');

retro_hunt.spl_splunk:
| comment "RETRO-HUNT: intel--0480eaa264dc898151449221 | Kazuar Malware Evolves Into Modular Espionage Ecosystem for  | Techniques: T1203 T1071"
index=* earliest=-90d latest=now
(
    ("<ip_indicator>")
    OR ("<domain_indicator>")
    OR ("436cfce71290c2fc2f2c362541db68ced6847c66a73b55487e5e5c73b0636c85" OR "69908f05b436bd97baae56296bf9b9e734486516f9bb9938c2b8752e152315d4" OR "6eb31006ca318a21eb619d008226f08e287f753aec9042269203290462eaa00d")
)
| eval hunt_advisory="intel--0480eaa264dc898151449221"
| eval hunt_techniques="T1203 T1071"
| eval hunt_ts=strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
| eval indicator_type=case(
    match(_raw, "(x.x.x.x"), "IP",
    match(_raw, "(domain"), "Domain",
    match(_raw, "(436cfce71290c2fc2f2c362541db68ced6847c66a73b55487e5e5c73b0636c85|69908f05b436bd97baae56296bf9b9e734486516f9bb9938c2b8752e152315d4"), "Hash",
    1==1, "Unknown"
  )
| stats count AS hits,
    min(_time) AS first_seen,
    max(_time) AS last_seen,
    dc(host) AS affected_hosts,
    values(sourcetype) AS sources
    BY hunt_advisory, indicator_type, host
| where hits > 0
| eval first_seen=strftime(first_seen,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ"),
       last_seen=strftime(last_seen,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
| sort - hits
retro_hunt.qradar_aql:
/* RETRO-HUNT AQL: intel--0480eaa264dc898151449221 | Lookback: 90d */
SELECT
    DATEFORMAT(devicetime,'YYYY-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') AS EventTime,
    sourceip, destinationip, destinationhostname,
    username, "Application", "Event Category",
    LOGSOURCENAME(logsourceid) AS LogSource,
    QIDNAME(qid) AS EventName,
    'intel--0480eaa264dc898151449221' AS HuntAdvisoryID
FROM events
WHERE (
    destinationip IN ('<ip>')
    OR sourceip IN ('<ip>')
    OR destinationhostname IN ('<domain>')
    OR LOOKUPHOSTNAME(destinationip) IN ('<domain>')
)
AND devicetime > (NOW() - 7776000)
ORDER BY devicetime DESC
LIMIT 10000
START '90d ago'
STOP 'now'
retro_hunt.crowdstrike_eql:
/* RETRO-HUNT CrowdStrike Event Query: intel--0480eaa264dc898151449221 | Techniques: T1203, T1071 */
#type=ProcessRollup2 | head 1000
| eval hunt_id="intel--0480eaa264dc898151449221"
| search (sha256 = "436cfce71290c2fc2f2c362541db68ced6847c66a73b55487e5e5c73b0636c85" or sha256 = "69908f05b436bd97baae56296bf9b9e734486516f9bb9938c2b8752e152315d4" or sha256 = "6eb31006ca318a21eb619d008226f08e287f753aec9042269203290462eaa00d") OR (DomainName = "<domain>")
| stats count by HostName, FileName, CommandLine, UserSid, TimeStamp
| sort count desc
retro_hunt.generic_sql:
/* RETRO-HUNT Generic SQL: intel--0480eaa264dc898151449221 | Lookback: 90d */
/* Compatible with: Splunk Data Lake, Snowflake, BigQuery, Azure Data Explorer */
SELECT
    event_timestamp,
    host_name,
    source_ip,
    destination_ip,
    destination_domain,
    file_hash_sha256,
    process_name,
    process_command_line,
    user_name,
    'intel--0480eaa264dc898151449221' AS hunt_advisory_id
FROM security_events
WHERE event_timestamp > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '90 days'
  AND (
    destination_ip IN ('<ip>')
    OR source_ip IN ('<ip>')
    OR destination_domain IN ('<domain>')
    OR file_hash_sha256 IN ('436cfce71290c2fc2f2c362541db68ced6847c66a73b55487e5e5c73b0636c85', '69908f05b436bd97baae56296bf9b9e734486516f9bb9938c2b8752e152315d4', '6eb31006ca318a21eb619d008226f08e287f753aec9042269203290462eaa00d')
  )
ORDER BY event_timestamp DESC
LIMIT 50000;

optional_telemetry.name: Microsoft Defender XDR — Advanced Hunting Tables

collection_gaps: MISSING (free): Sysmon EventID 3 — Network Connection — Sysmon (SysInternals)

FREE ENHANCEMENT: Add Zeek Network Analysis Framework for richer telemetry

normalized_rules.kql:
// Sentinel Rule: Kazuar Malware Evolves Into Modular Espionage Ecosystem for  | intel--0480eaa264dc898151449221 | Techniques: TT1190 | TT1071 | TT1203
// Severity: medium
DeviceNetworkEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("<indicator>")
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, AccountName, ProcessCommandLine,
          InitiatingProcessFileName, ProcessCommandLine
| extend AdvisoryID="intel--0480eaa264dc898151449221", Techniques="TT1190 | TT1071 | TT1203"
normalized_rules.spl:
| comment "Splunk Rule: Kazuar Malware Evolves Into Modular Espionage Ecosystem for  | intel--0480eaa264dc898151449221"
index=network sourcetype=stream:tcp earliest=-30d latest=now
("<indicator>")
| eval hunt_id="intel--0480eaa264dc898151449221" | eval severity="medium"
| stats count AS hits, min(_time) AS first, max(_time) AS last,
    dc(host) AS hosts BY CommandLine, host, sourcetype
| where hits > 0 | sort - hits

// Elastic Lucene: intel--0480eaa264dc898151449221
("<indicator>") AND @timestamp:[now-30d TO now]
